You're dead. I made him just like a couple times only. I hit my dad's and nose car. Not a good impression. We hit this other car and woman gets out to come and talk to us and we're looking at any damages. She had a small dent in her car. She came over. She's asking about where we're from, what's our story. So we told her our whole story of the road trip. She was more interested in us than her car, surprisingly. And at the end of the conversation, she hugged both of us and she was like, oh, good luck on your trip. And that was it. And then I called my dad and I was even nervous just because I felt bad. And my dad says, was anyone hurt? I said no. And he said, we're the cops involved. And I said no. And he said, you're good then. No problem. He was just concerned about our safety. But it was just really funny. There's not many times when you get into car accident and then they hug you. Right. We pull into a Walmart parking lot to park and stay overnight. We had to save the money. Mostly we sleep in the Walmart. Yeah, it was our go-to spot. We had our toothbrushes and toothpaste. And they were like, you can't sleep here because it was not a Walmart super center. If it's a super center, you can stay there. And this one said you could not sleep there. We didn't know.
